sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str1 VARCHAR(255), str2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'abcdef', 'ef'), (2, NULL, 'EF'), (3, 'testString', 'STRING');
CREATE TABLE test_urls (url_id INT, url_str VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_urls (url_id, url_str) VALUES (1, 'https://www.example.com'), (2, 'not a url'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, endswith(url 'https://www.example.com', str2, true) AS ends_with FROM test_strings WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL AND str1 <> '';
SELECT url_id, str1 FROM test_strings JOIN test_urls ON endswith(url 'https://www.example.com', str2, false) AND url_str IS NOT NULL GROUP BY url_id, str1 HAVING COUNT(id) > 1;
SELECT str1, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY endswith(str1, str2, true)) AS count_ends FROM test_strings WHERE endswith(str1, 'f', true) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY count_ends DESC;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE NOT (str1 IS NULL OR str2 IS NULL) AND endswith(CONCAT(str1, 'WXYZ'), url 'https://not-a-url', false);
SELECT * FROM test_urls WHERE url_str IS NOT NULL AND endswith(url 'http://example.com', url_str, true) = true;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_join AS SELECT t1.id, t2.url_id FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_urls t2 ON t1.str1 IS NOT NULL AND endswith(t1.str2, 'EF', true);
ALTER TABLE test_strings ADD COLUMN is_valid BOOLEAN DEFAULT NULL;
